text: For ‘Idumaea’ some Greek manuscripts read ‘Judaea’. Neither reading gives a good sense, and it seems possible that the name of Accaron, or some other Philistine town, has been accidentally miswritten.
For ‘Judaea’ the Greek manuscripts have ‘Idumaea’, and for ‘Bethoron’, ‘Bethsura’. Cf. verse 61 below.
